title: Orbea circes
taxonomy: Orbea circes is classified as a species of flowering plant in the family Apocynaceae. This family includes a wide variety of plants commonly known as dogbanes, oleander, and periwinkles. Within the genus Orbea, Orbea circes is one of several species of succulent plants native to southern Africa. The genus Orbea is a group of small to medium-sized succulents that are often characterized by their tubular flowers and fleshy leaves. Orbea circes is a relatively rare species within the genus, known for its unique and striking appearance.
